name: Install - OpenClaw
snippet: It detects your OS, installs Node if needed, installs OpenClaw, and launches onboarding. For all flags and CI/automation options, see Installer internals. macOS, Linux, or Windows — both native Windows and WSL2 are supported; WSL2 is more stable. See Windows. Or skip the link and use pnpm openclaw ... from inside the repo.

name: OpenClaw | The AI That Actually Does Things
snippet: OpenClaw is a free, open-source AI assistant that runs on your machine. Automate tasks across WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, and 30+ platforms with Claude, GPT, or local models. 310k+ GitHub stars.
